headline: A Look At Regions Financial (RF) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent performance snapshot and why Regions Financial is on watch Regions Financial (RF) has come into focus after a mixed stretch for the stock, with a month return of about 16% decline and a past 3 months performance of roughly 8% decline, despite a 1 year total return above 20%. At a recent close of US$25.36 and a market cap near US$21.8b, the bank sits against a backdrop of reported annual revenue of about US$7.1b and net income of roughly US$2.1b. This offers investors a starting point...
